author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(build) fine-tune build process
body:
* depend on rollup globally so we can run tasks
* split up yarn boot
* *do* track `yarn.lock`, [why](https://yarnpkg.com/blog/2016/11/24/lockfiles-for-all/)
* add 'empty' eslintrc.json file that tells eslint we're using es6 and modules
